[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011010111 7
1 1111110010 7
2 0100110110 5
3 0010010001 3
4 1001110100 5
5 1100101001 5
6 0111110000 5
7 1001100000 3

34 43 1110011110 7

56 65 1011000100 4
67 76 0110100111 6
70 07 1011100101 6

02 20 0111110000 5 match 6
13 31 1001100000 3 match 7
24 42 0101010011 5

46 64 1111100001 6

71 17 1110111000 6
